goal: Record the actual definition, database, image, Runner, API, Core, and browser baseline without support claims.
acceptance_criteria: all 13 formal slugs have a documented evidence state
no Worker receives an inferred support claim

goal: Make the embedded definition the checked Worker creation input and retain every product-facing field.
acceptance_criteria: Definition bundle hashes are checked at creation time

goal: Reject unknown adapters, remove mock substitutions, and remove frontend credential form fallbacks.
acceptance_criteria: mock binaries and unsupported form mappings are rejected

goal: Create an opt-in disposable fixture for authenticated product-path verification.
acceptance_criteria: fixture identities are disposable and isolated
authenticated browser validation has deterministic setup and cleanup

goal: Prove the Codex CLI special-adapter product path with real image, Runner, API, and browser evidence.
acceptance_criteria: real image, Runner, API, Core, and browser evidence are recorded
no formal deployment claim is made from local proof

goal: Prove the Gemini CLI generic ACP product path without command-derived adapter selection.
acceptance_criteria: missing authorized model resources block visible progress without fallback

goal: Audit selected Worker credential, launch, and adapter contracts against real commands, then remove any unsupported product mapping without promotion.
acceptance_criteria: real command evidence drives credential and launch mappings
unsupported paths remain blocked rather than inferred

goal: Run every remaining Worker through the same evidence model and record verified or blocked outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: every formal Worker has exactly one run
every run is verified_local_dev or reproducibly blocked

goal: Independently review the matrix and run the terminal verifier without publishing or deploying.
acceptance_criteria: terminal verifier is run without weakening
